calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Arnold W. Evje II, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Akshay Amin.
Witness Akshay Amin sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Jerome Stanberry and Drunesha Jackson.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Defendant's Exhibits:
1-Document of Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Settlement Hearing.

Court returns Defendant's exhibits back to counsel.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 433 Ellis Street, #212, San Francisco, California 94102, San Francisco County.

Damages $851.00
Holdover damages $1650.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $270.00
for a Total Judgment of $2771.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 16
Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Akshay Amin is present.
Attorney Arnold Evje for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jerome Stanberry and Drunesha Jackson are present.
Attorney Dylan Rudolph appearing for defendants in limited scope.

Per report of Plaintiff's counsel, Defendant Jackson left at 2:45 pm.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Nov. 16, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
